summary: A 10-second, music-scored ICE arrest clip (no spoken transcript) shot from a vehicle POV/dashcam of a street vehicle-takedown of fugitive Guatemalan sex offender Ander Cortez-Mendez. Agents in POLICE vests swarm and box in a pickup on a suburban Virginia street while the footage is given a heavy cinematic teal-and-orange color grade, vignette, and dramatic contrast over a music bed. The deliberate color grading, tight action cutting and scoring turn raw enforcement footage into an action-movie-style spectacle, putting it in scope as produced youth-appeal content.

script.scene: Vehicle-POV down a tree-lined suburban street (Falls Church, VA), unmarked SUV ahead with brake lights, heavy desaturated/teal cinematic grade and vignette.
Convoy closes on a line of parked vehicles; a 'Panorama Remodeling' work van and a dark Nissan pickup come into frame as agents prepare to move.
Agents in tactical 'POLICE' vests pile out and converge on foot around the target pickup, weapons/hands up, suspect's truck boxed in.
Close-quarters takedown: agents swarm the driver's side of the Nissan and pull the suspect, stylized contrast and motion blur.
Final beat of the arrest in progress, agents controlling the suspect against the vehicle, graded blue-cold tone.
